location: Dropped by Vulgar Militia enemies wielding it. Easiest farmed along the road between the Farum Greatbridge Site of Grace and Bestial Sanctum in Dragonbarrow, Caelid — ridable on Torrent for quick reset laps.
tactics: Ride the Farum Greatbridge-to-Bestial Sanctum road on Torrent, killing Vulgar Militia along the way, then loop back to reset at the grace.
Drop rate is low (around 2%), so expect several passes before it appears.
The optional boss Flying Dragon Greyll guards the bridge near Farum Greatbridge — be ready for an aerial ambush if farming nearby.
Shadow Militiamen, a variant enemy, can also drop this weapon at a similar rate if encountered elsewhere.
lore: A hook-bladed polearm carried by the Vulgar Militia, unglamorous soldiers who hold thankless, scorched battlegrounds no one else dares approach. Its curved tip is shaped to slip past a raised shield.

builds.name: Dexterity Guard-Piercing Halberd
builds.why: C scaling in Dexterity plus an innate guard-slipping property on its attacks make it a solid Dexterity pick for pressuring shielded or turtling enemies.
